rows.notes: Included from gpt-5-mini. This page number is clearly visible in the top left margin and was missed by gemini-flash.
Consensus across both extractors. Clearly a year header with no associated monetary amount.

Amounts are a consensus. Description visually verified as 'Bro. over'. gpt-5-mini correctly identified it as an abbreviation for 'Brought over' ('Bro't over'), which is closer than gemini-flash's 'Book over'.
Consensus on monetary amounts and row type. gemini-flash's description includes the final period which is clearly visible in the image.
rows.english_description: Payment to Mr Davenport, the surveyor, for a professional surveyor's bill.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr Davenport, the surveyor, for a professional surveyor's bill, amounting to £75 3s 0d.

rows.description: To Mr Robertson, architect, on acct. of Merton
rows.notes: Amounts and row type are consensus. Visually verified the description's last word as 'Merton', overriding gpt-5-mini's 'Weston'. gpt-5-mini's note correctly identified ambiguity but had an incorrect reading.
rows.english_description: Payment to Mr Robertson, the architect, on account of work at Merton.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr Robertson, the architect, on account of work at Merton, amounting to £74 0s 0d.

rows.description: Rectors Improved Stip. fr Mich. 1826. to 1827
rows.notes: Amounts and row type are consensus. Visually verified the description, including the period after '1826.', which gemini-flash transcribed correctly. gpt-5-mini's notes were insightful regarding abbreviations but missed the period.
rows.english_description: The Rector's improved stipend for the year from Michaelmas 1826 to Michaelmas 1827.
rows.english_description_with_amount: The Rector's improved stipend for the year from Michaelmas 1826 to Michaelmas 1827, amounting to £100 0s 0d.

rows.description: Int. to the Library Fund on 3060.14.11
rows.notes: gpt-5-mini correctly identified that no monetary amount is on this line due to the brace. Description corrected based on visual verification: the number is '3060.14.11', not '30601.14.11', and gemini-flash had the correct number.
rows.english_description: Interest to be applied to the Library Fund on the capital sum of £3060 14s 11d.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Interest to be applied to the Library Fund on the capital sum of £3060 14s 11d.

rows.notes: Amounts taken from gpt-5-mini, which correctly places them on this line for the braced entry. Visually verified '4 pc.' (not 'pr.') and a period after '1826.'. gpt-5-mini's note on the '¾' fraction is accurate.
rows.english_description: Interest at 4 percent for the year from Michaelmas 1826 to Michaelmas 1827 on the stated capital.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Interest at 4% for the year from Michaelmas 1826 to Michaelmas 1827, amounting to £122 14s 4.75d.

rows.notes: Amounts and row type are consensus. Visually verified the description as 'To the Coal catcher'. gpt-5-mini misidentified 'Coal' as 'Rat'.
rows.english_description: Payment to the coal-catcher (wage or fee for handling/receiving coal).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to the coal-catcher, amounting to £1 10s 0d.

rows.notes: Amounts and row type are consensus. Description refined based on visual verification, using periods after 'Letters' and 'parcels', capitalizing 'Stamps', and no period after '&c'.
rows.english_description: Expenses for letters, parcels, postage stamps and related postal charges.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Expenses for letters, parcels, postage stamps and related postal charges, amounting to £4 11s 7d.

rows.notes: Amounts and row type are consensus. gemini-flash correctly identified the total amount itself as the description text for this final row. gpt-5-mini left the description empty, which is inaccurate.
